approvals.feedback: Understanding Summary approved - comprehensive analysis covering strategic context, technical architecture, user personas, security framework, and development strategy
BRD approved - comprehensive requirements with 50+ specifications, 280% ROI projection, enterprise security compliance, and complete user story coverage

interview_history.question: What type of application are you looking to build?
interview_history.answer: Web application (browser-based) - A productivity and project governance application for BA and PM teams to standardize workflows, ensure documentation consistency, improve tracking, control scope drift, and enable financial visibility across projects.

interview_history.question: Who are the primary target users?
interview_history.answer: C) Internal teams + Full client collaboration (clients can participate in workflows, approvals, etc.) with Scale C) Large enterprise (100-500 users)

interview_history.question: What are the core features for Version 1?
interview_history.answer: I) All features (comprehensive v1) - Complete suite including workflow management, scope drift detection, financial governance, task allocation, multi-industry templates, and research workflows

interview_history.question: Timeline and budget?
interview_history.answer: Hard stop of 2 weeks using AI agents to build everything - Ultra-fast track approach

interview_history.question: Tech stack and hosting preferences?
interview_history.answer: A) Modern full-stack (Next.js + TypeSQL + PostgreSQL + Tailwind) with A) Cloud hosting (AWS/Azure/GCP)

interview_history.question: Scope for 2-week MVP?
interview_history.answer: D) All features but simplified UI (focus on functionality over polish) with out of scope: A) Advanced reporting dashboards + C) Complex integrations (email/calendar sync, etc.)

interview_history.question: Critical assumptions or constraints?
interview_history.answer: D) No major technical constraints - build for flexibility, D) No major business constraints, E) All success factors critical: user adoption, accurate financial calculations, bulletproof scope drift detection, seamless client collaboration

interview_history.question: Integration and Data Requirements
interview_history.answer: A, B, D [RBAC] - User Authentication, Data Import/Export capabilities, and Compliance & Security with Role-Based Access Controls
